title: Mod Loading and Content Initialization
interaction_flow: ClientLauncher.setup() → new Mods() [instantiates mod manager]
ClientLauncher.setup() → AssetManager.load(new Vars()) [triggers Mods.load() on bg thread]
Vars.load() → Mods.load() [scans modDirectory for .jar/.zip/folders]
Mods.load() → Mods.findMeta(zip) → reads mod.json/mod.hjson → returns ModMeta [for each candidate]
Mods.load() → Mods.resolveDependencies(metas) → returns OrderedMap<name, ModState> [dependency sort]
Mods.load() → Mods.loadMod(file, false, enabled) [for each resolved mod]
Mods.loadMod() → findMeta(zip) [re-read meta]
Mods.loadMod() → platform.loadJar(sourceFile, mainLoader) → ClassLoader [java mods only]
Mods.loadMod() → Class.forName(mainClass) → main.newInstance() → Mod [instantiate mod class]
Mods.loadMod() → returns LoadedMod [mod.state=enabled/disabled]
Mods.load() → updateDependencies(mod), sortMods(), buildFiles() [finalize load]
ClientLauncher.setup() → AssetManager.loadRun('contentcreate') [async: createBaseContent + loadColors]
contentcreate async → ContentLoader.createBaseContent() [loads Items, Bullets, UnitTypes, Blocks, etc.]
contentcreate async → ContentLoader.loadColors() [reads block_colors.png pixmap]
contentcreate sync-complete → Mods.loadScripts() [runs JS mods]
Mods.loadScripts() → content.setCurrentMod(mod), Scripts.run(mod, main.js) [for each mod with scripts/]
contentcreate sync-complete → ContentLoader.createModContent() → Mods.loadContent()
Mods.loadContent() → content.setCurrentMod(mod), mod.main.loadContent() [Java class mods first, ordered by dependency]
Mods.loadContent() → parser.parse(mod, name, json, file, type) [for each content JSON file in content/ dirs]
ContentParser.parse() → content.handleContent(content) [assigns id, adds to contentMap]
ContentParser.parse() → content.handleMappableContent(content) [registers name→content in nameMap]
ClientLauncher.setup() → AssetManager.load(mods) [Loadable: calls loadAsync + loadSync]
Mods.loadAsync() → eachEnabled(mod → packSprites(packer, sprites, mod)) [per-mod sprite PNG discovery]
Mods.loadAsync() → packSprites() → mainExecutor.submit(→ Pixmap.read, Pixmaps.bleed) [parallel pixmap loading]
Mods.loadAsync() → packer tasks resolved → packer.add(page, name, region) [sequential atlas packing]
Mods.loadAsync() → atlas pages generated, atlas updated, AtlasPackEvent fired
Mods.loadSync() → loadIcons() → loadIcon(mod) → new Texture(icon.png) [for each mod with icon.png]
ClientLauncher.setup() → AssetManager.loadRun('contentinit') [async: content.init(), sync: content.load()]
contentinit async → ContentLoader.init() → initialize(Content::init) [calls content.init() on all registered content]
ContentLoader.init() → initialize(Content::postInit) [calls content.postInit() on all]
ContentLoader.init() → Events.fire(ContentInitEvent)
contentinit sync-complete → ContentLoader.load() → initialize(Content::loadIcon) [loads sprite regions from atlas]
ContentLoader.load() → initialize(Content::load) [loads detailed texture data, e.g. UnitType parts/weapons]
ClientLauncher.update() (loop) → assets.update() → when done: mods.eachClass(Mod::init) [post-load mod init]
ClientLauncher.update() → Events.fire(ClientLoadEvent) [signals full load complete]
key_relationships: Mods implements Loadable (loadAsync/loadSync called by AssetManager)
Mods depends_on ContentParser (parser.parse() for JSON content)
Mods depends_on Scripts (scripts.run() for JS mods)
ContentLoader holds contentMap: Seq<Content>[] indexed by ContentType
ContentLoader holds contentNameMap: ObjectMap<String,MappableContent>[] for name lookups
MappableContent extends Content, adds name field
UnlockableContent extends MappableContent, overrides loadIcon() to load atlas region
UnitType extends UnlockableContent, overrides init() (builds unit example, resolves weapons) and load() (loads part regions)
LoadedMod holds: Fi file, Fi root, Mod main, ClassLoader loader, ModMeta meta, ModState state
ModState enum: enabled, disabled, unsupported, contentErrors, incompleteDependencies, missingDependencies, circularDependencies
phase_summary: Phase 1 (Vars.load): Mods.load() — discover mod files, parse mod.json, resolve dependencies, instantiate Mod classes
Phase 2 (contentcreate async): ContentLoader.createBaseContent() — registers all vanilla content
Phase 2 (contentcreate complete): Mods.loadScripts() then ContentLoader.createModContent()/Mods.loadContent() — register mod content via Java or JSON/ContentParser
Phase 3 (mods Loadable async): Mods.loadAsync() — pack mod sprites into atlas via MultiPacker (parallel pixmap reads)
Phase 3 (mods Loadable sync): Mods.loadSync()/loadIcons() — load mod icon.png textures
Phase 4 (contentinit async): ContentLoader.init() — call init()/postInit() on every Content; fire ContentInitEvent
Phase 4 (contentinit complete): ContentLoader.load() — call loadIcon()/load() on every Content (texture regions from atlas)
important_notes: Mods.loadAsync() is called by AssetManager on background thread; sprite packing uses parallel Future<Runnable> tasks via mainExecutor
loadSync() (=loadIcons) runs on main/GL thread after loadAsync completes
ContentLoader.initialize() is idempotent — tracks already-run callables in Set to prevent double-init
ContentParser.parse() is the JSON→Content bridge; calls handleContent + handleMappableContent to register each content item
mod.main.loadContent() is the Java mod entry point for registering new UnitType/Floor/BulletType objects
Blacklisted mods (ui-lib, braindustry, schema, old scheme-size versions) are skipped at loadMod stage
resolveDependencies() produces a topologically-sorted OrderedMap for correct load order
content.setCurrentMod(mod) before any content registration ensures mod ownership is tracked on minfo.mod
Error handling: mod content errors call mods.handleContentError(), parser.markError(); game continues with partial content
Server path (ServerLauncher) calls content.createModContent() directly without AssetManager async phases
